title: allium sanctum
intro: Allium sanctum, also known as Tulsi or Holy Basil, is a sacred plant in Ayurvedic medicine, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies. The health benefits of Allium sanctum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system, as well as being used to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Allium sanctum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed on their own or combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
